accurate.why: Claims about the bill's provisions and riders are consistent with the bill text and known content of the act.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; policy rider descriptions are accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 appropriations for DOD, VA, and related agencies.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes key policy riders including Guantanamo restrictions, abortion exceptions, gender-affirming care ban, animal research restrictions, DEI prohibitions, and COVID mandate prohibitions.

effective_dates.why: Notes general FY2025 availability, construction funds through 2029, and some accounts through 2026 or until expended.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all four titles including related agencies and general provisions.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names VA, DOD, American Battle Monuments Commission, U.S. Court of Appeals for Veterans Claims, and the Armed Forces Retirement Home.

correct_figures.why: Correctly identifies FY2025, construction funds through 2029, and March 9, 2026 animal research phase-out deadline.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
